selling_points_predicted: Land inspiration to the highest-grossing film of all time, Avatar
Over 20,000 visitors daily yet still offers peace and quiet in various corners
Five distinct areas to explore including Yuanjiajie, Yangjiajie, Tianzi Mountain, Huangshi Village, and Golden Whip Stream
Massive discounts available when booking tickets through your hotel, including unlimited cable car rides
Record-breaking Bailong Elevator with double-decker cabins and three lanes
Convenient facial recognition entry system eliminates need to show tickets or passports repeatedly
Abundant affordable food options throughout the park with street stalls and fresh local cuisine
First Bridge Under Heaven, a completely natural bridge archway 350 meters above ground
Spectacular 15-minute cable car rides offering incredible mountain views from above
Iconic towering quartz sandstone pillar mountains jutting dramatically from the earth
Abundant wildlife including monkeys visible throughout multiple sections of the park
Peaceful Golden Whip Stream walk along the mountain base with soaring towers overhead
